dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your care.

profiles.title: Patient profiles
profiles.empty: Add yourself and the family you book for — history is kept per person.

upcoming.title: Upcoming appointments
upcoming.emptyDescription: When you book a doctor, lab or scan, it will show up here.

completed.title: Recently completed
completed.emptyDescription: Your visit history will appear here after your first appointment.

bookAgain.title: Book again
bookAgain.emptyDescription: Providers you've visited before will appear here for a one-tap rebooking.

bookings.title: My bookings
bookings.subtitle: Every booking belongs to a patient profile. Reschedule, cancel or review any of them.

empty.upcomingDescription: Book a doctor, lab test or scan and it will show up here.
empty.completedDescription: Once you attend an appointment it will be listed here.
empty.cancelledDescription: Nothing cancelled or refunded — that's a good thing.
empty.allDescription: Your appointment history will live here.

card.queueNote: The clinic runs as a queue, so this is an estimate, not an exact appointment time.
card.refunded: Your {amount} booking fee has been refunded to your original payment method.
card.refundPending: Refund in progress — {amount} is on its way back to your original payment method. Your bank may take up to {days} working days to show it.
card.longWaitBody: It counts towards this provider's waiting-time rating, not against you.
card.reportLongWait: I arrived but left after a long wait

cancel.title: Cancel this appointment?
cancel.description: Your appointment with {provider} on {date} will be cancelled. It can't be undone — you would need to book again.
cancel.held: This place is only being held — nothing has been charged, so there is nothing to refund.
cancel.notPaid: You haven't paid an online booking fee for this appointment, so cancelling costs you nothing.
cancel.free: You're cancelling more than {hours} hours ahead, so your {amount} booking fee is refunded in full, back to the way you paid. Banks can take up to {days} working days to show it.
cancel.late: You're cancelling less than {hours} hours before the appointment, so your {amount} booking fee is not refunded. The visit fee itself was never charged — you only pay that at the clinic.
cancel.toastRefunded: Your {amount} booking fee is being refunded.
cancel.toastNotRefunded: Reference {reference} · the booking fee was not refunded.

longWait.title: You waited too long and left?
longWait.description: Tell us and we'll record it against {provider}'s waiting time on {date}.
longWait.reassurance: This is not a missed visit and nothing is held against you. You turned up — the wait didn't hold up its end. It feeds the provider's waiting-time reputation, so other patients see an honest picture before they book.
longWait.confirm: Yes, I left after a long wait
longWait.toastTitle: Thank you — that's recorded against the waiting time.
longWait.toastDescription: {provider}'s waiting-time rating reflects this. Nothing is held against you.

review.commentPlaceholder: What went well? What could be better? (at least 10 characters)
review.createdDescription: Your feedback on {provider} is now live.
review.editDescription: Update your rating or rewrite what you said.

reviews.title: My reviews
reviews.count: {count, plural, one {You've written # review.} other {You've written # reviews.}}
reviews.subtitle: Feedback you leave after a visit shows up here.
reviews.emptyDescription: After a completed appointment you can rate your visit and help other patients.
reviews.deleteDescription: Your rating will be removed from the provider's profile. This can't be undone, but you can always write a new review for that visit.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.count: {count, plural, one {# saved provider.} other {# saved providers.}}
favorites.subtitle: Providers you save appear here for quick rebooking.
favorites.emptyDescription: Tap the heart on any provider to save them here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unread: {count, plural, one {# unread notification.} other {# unread notifications.}}
notifications.emptyUnread: No unread notifications on this channel.
notifications.emptyDescription: New booking updates and offers will show up here.
notifications.markedAllRead: {count, plural, one {Marked # notification as read.} other {Marked # notifications as read.}}

preferences.title: Notification preferences
preferences.description: Choose how you'd like to hear about your appointments.
preferences.sms: Appointment reminders sent as a text message.

account.detailsDescription: These details pre-fill your booking forms. Your email address can't be changed.

validation.name: Please enter your full name.
validation.phone: Enter a valid Egyptian mobile number (11 digits).
validation.dateOfBirthPast: Your date of birth must be in the past.

profiles.title: Patient profiles
profiles.subtitle: Your account, and the family members you book for.
profiles.notice: Every booking is made for a patient profile, never for the account as a whole — so each person's booking and medical history stays with them. Profiles are private to this account and are never linked to anyone else's, even if the name or phone number matches.
profiles.emptyDescription: Add yourself and the family members you book for. Bookings, results and history are kept per person.

profileCard.age: {count, plural, one {# year old} other {# years old}}
profileCard.bookings: {count, plural, =0 {No bookings} one {# booking} other {# bookings}}
profileCard.removeDescription: This profile will be removed from your account. Booking and medical history belongs to the profile, so a profile with bookings on record can't be removed.

profileDialog.description: Bookings belong to a patient profile, not to your account — so each person's medical and booking history stays with them. We ask for gender and date of birth because we screen every test and scan against them before you book: it is what stops a scan being booked for someone it isn't safe for.
profileDialog.relationshipSelfLocked: This is your own profile and can't be reassigned.
profileDialog.genderHint: Some tests and scans are restricted by gender.
profileDialog.dateOfBirthHint: Age limits apply to several scans.
profileDialog.nationalIdHint: As printed on the national ID card. Some providers ask for it on arrival.

validation.relationship: Choose who this profile is for.
validation.dateOfBirthPast: The date of birth must be in the past.
validation.phone: Enter a valid Egyptian mobile number (11 digits), or leave it blank.
validation.nationalId: A national ID is 14 digits, or leave it blank.
